name: The Ninth House
description: Out in the black, on frequency, the tales of the ramshackle Spaceship "The Bone Marrow" and her crew echo like ghost stories.  Ship's mascot and sentient hovering sodacan AI - "Bubblina" keeps the interstellar vibe going, with Space cowgirl Scarlett o'Interfacé playing the southern gothic tunes into the early hours.
